headline: Why Apple's Delay In Launching A Much-Awaited AR/VR Headset Makes Sense: Analyst
summary: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) is reportedly  delaying  the launch of its mixed reality headset until the end of 2022 or later.

headline: Shiba Inu Vs. Dogecoin: Here's Which Cryptocurrency Is Trending More On Google
summary: Amid another busy week of cryptocurrency trading, the Benzinga team decided to take a look into how often popular cryptocurrencies Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) and Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) are being searched for, relative to one another.

summary: This weekend's Barron's cover story says stocks, bonds, and crypto have taken a slide since 2022 and things could get worse in the near term.

summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is currently ranked the 11th biggest cryptocurrencies in the market due to its growing community of holders and supporters.

headline: Tesla, Nio Battery Supplier CATL To Launch Battery Swapping Service: Report
summary: Nio, Inc. (NYSE: NIO) has popularized battery swapping by setting up a network of battery swap stations and China and offering it as a service. A new report says the EV maker may soon have to contend with competition in this arena.

headline: Will Dogecoin Reach $1 By 2023? Over 60% Say...
summary:
Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

This week, we posed the following question to Benzinga visitors: By 2023, will Dogecoin reach $1?
